title: Fun on the Farm: Animal Friends Coloring Page
description: A simple farm scene featuring four friendly farm animals for young children to color. This coloring activity introduces common farm animals while developing fine motor skills and creativity.
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. You can use the suggested colors or choose your own!

content.image: A simple farm scene with four friendly farm animals standing on grass with a barn in the background. The animals include a cow, pig, chicken, and sheep.

elements.name: Cow
elements.description: A friendly cow with black spots. You could color the spots black and the body white.

elements.name: Pig
elements.description: A smiling pig with a curly tail. Pigs are often pink.

elements.name: Chicken
elements.description: A small chicken with wings and a beak. You could color it yellow, brown, or white.

elements.name: Sheep
elements.description: A fluffy sheep with curly wool. You could color the wool white or light gray.

elements.name: Barn
elements.description: A simple barn in the background. Barns are often red with white trim.

elements.name: Grass
elements.description: The ground where the animals are standing. Grass is usually green.

elements.name: Sky
elements.description: The sky above the farm. You could color it blue.

learningFacts: Cows give us milk, which we can drink or use to make cheese and butter.
Pigs are very smart animals that like to play in mud to stay cool.
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat for breakfast.
Sheep grow wool that can be used to make warm clothes like sweaters.
